confidence.rationale: The fixture intent is visible in local files, but command output remains the authority.

human_review.reason: AI judgment is advisory and cannot replace command evidence.

residual_risk: Advisory fixture judgment can drift when checker rules change.
claim_boundary: This AI judgment covers only the missing-description bad static fixture. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
